evals.prompt: Review the file src/utils/calculator.py with Codex. Check for any logic errors or edge case issues.
evals.expected_output: An execution plan to review the file using codex exec --ephemeral -s read-only. Includes file contents in the prompt via a heredoc pattern. Wrapped with a timeout.

evals.prompt: Independently verify the entire src/auth/ directory changed in this PR from a security perspective using Codex. Save cross-verification artifacts to /tmp/xv/.
evals.expected_output: A plan to perform a security audit using codex exec and save results as artifacts to /tmp/xv/. Uses the standard artifact format (Status, Findings, Verdict).

evals.prompt: Verify the correctness of this algorithm using Codex. Also, let me know what to do if codex isn't installed.
evals.expected_output: Checks availability with command -v codex, then performs the review if installed. If not, provides installation instructions (npm install -g @openai/codex) and a fallback strategy.
